title: Extra line
description: Add one more main-program line so your strategy fits more comfortably.

title: Brighter side rails
description: Make the jackpot and return rails glow more clearly on the board.

title: Gate hold
description: Keep the return gate open longer so a good conditional can cash it in more easily.

title: Helper buffer
description: Give the helper editor two extra lines for a longer reusable tactic.

title: Echo boost
description: Make the visible echo target pay out more when the marked lane is hit.

title: Feeder persistence
description: Keep combo lights charged between weaker runs instead of emptying immediately.

title: Lightning bonus
description: Make lightning shots worth more after the combo feeder fully charges.
